modules.sql: SELECT as_of AS event_date, COUNT(*) AS overdraft_count, SUM(overdraft_amount) AS total_overdraft_amount, SUM(fee_amount) AS total_fees, as_of FROM overdraft_events GROUP BY as_of UNION ALL SELECT 'WEEKLY_TOTAL' AS event_date, COUNT(*) AS overdraft_count, SUM(overdraft_amount) AS total_overdraft_amount, SUM(fee_amount) AS total_fees, MAX(as_of) AS as_of FROM overdraft_events WHERE (SELECT strftime('%w', MAX(as_of)) FROM overdraft_events) = '0'
